name: pi-multi-account
description_en: Automatic multi-account failover & rotation for Pi Agent across Anthropic (Claude), OpenAI/ChatGPT Codex, Qwen/Alibaba, and Ollama. Auto-discovers authenticated accounts, grows the rotation on login, and drops accounts on logout, expiry, or quota/rate-lim
description_zh: Pi Agent 在 Anthropic（Claude）、OpenAI/ChatGPT Codex、Qwen/Alibaba 和 Ollama 之间的自动多账户故障转移和轮换。自动发现已验证账户，在登录时扩展轮换，并在登出、过期或配额/速率限制时删除账户
